import IFixture from '../interfaces/fixture';

const Fixtures : IFixture[] = [
    {
        id: 1,
        date: "9th September",
        result: "W",
        location: "A",
        opposition: "Walton MK Kestrels",        
        oppScore: 0,
        npScore: 8,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        date: "16th September",
        result: "W",
        location: "A",
        opposition: "City Colts",
        oppScore: 3,
        npScore: 9,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        date: "23rd September",
        result: "L", 
        location: "H",       
        opposition: "Stony Stratford",
        npScore: 0,
        oppScore: 4,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 0
    },
    {
        id: 4,
        date: "30th September",
        result: "W",
        location: "A",     
        opposition: "Mortonville Juniors",        
        npScore: 6,
        oppScore: 3,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 5,
        date: "7th October",
        result: "W",
        location: "H",        
        opposition: "MK Wanderers",
        npScore: 8,
        oppScore: 2,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 6,
        date: "14th October",
        result: "W",
        location: "A",        
        opposition: "Panthers",
        npScore: 6,
        oppScore: 5,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {
        id: 7,
        date: "11th November",
        result: "W",
        location: "A",
        opposition: "Turvey",
        npScore: 9,
        oppScore: 1,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
];

export default Fixtures;
